headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for Oasis Mini kinetic sand tables. Just enter your Oasis account email and password — your tables are discovered automatically.

name.title: Name
name.description: The base name used for your table(s) in HomeKit.

email.title: Oasis Account Email
email.description: The email for your Oasis account — the same login you use in the official Oasis app. The Oasis cloud requires per-account sign-in.

password.title: Oasis Account Password
password.description: Your Oasis account password. Stored only in your local Homebridge config and sent only to the official Oasis cloud (app.grounded.so) to sign in.

serial.title: Device Serial Number (optional)
serial.description: Leave blank to auto-discover every table on your account. Set a serial only if you want to add one specific table. Found on the bottom of the device or in the Oasis app under Settings.

tables.title: Tables (optional — leave empty to auto-discover)
tables.description: Only needed if you want to pin specific tables or give them custom names. Leave empty and every table on the account is added automatically.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for this table in HomeKit (optional).

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll the device for status updates (backup to real-time MQTT).
